I build practical AI-agent and automation systems, with experience across enterprise technical support, DevOps operations, data workflows, and business-facing IT delivery.

Experience

Work

Technical Support

Cross-border payment technology company

Support merchant API and AI Skill integrations while maintaining observability for overseas financial channels.

  • Built Datadog-based monitoring and custom log rules for full-link issue detection.
  • Supported SLA stability above 99.9%.

ITBP / Finance Systems

Automotive enterprise

Managed finance information-system delivery, operations, data governance, and automation opportunities for business teams.

  • Coordinated requirements with IT teams and supported iterative system improvements.
  • Maintained SAP, BI, and reporting workflows for financial data synchronization.

DevOps / SCCM Technical Support

Enterprise software service provider

Handled global endpoint support, Microsoft ecosystem troubleshooting, and enterprise endpoint deployment operations.

  • Maintained SOPs and knowledge-base articles for repeatable troubleshooting and compliance workflows.
  • Used SCCM, WSUS, and Intune for standardized imaging, software rollout, and update operations.
  • Improved endpoint update efficiency through conflict analysis and workflow optimization.
